grades.expectation: Response mentions s84 Law of Property Act 1925 as an option for modification/discharge
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions section 84 Law of Property Act 1925 and explains grounds for discharge/modification

grades.expectation: Response mentions restrictive covenant indemnity insurance with approximate cost range
grades.reason: Provides detailed cost ranges: £100-£300 for straightforward cases, £300-£600 for higher risk, £150-£400 for business use specifically

grades.expectation: Response states that approaching the covenant beneficiary invalidates indemnity insurance
grades.reason: Clearly states 'You usually must not contact the person with the benefit of the covenant before taking out indemnity insurance' and explains why

grades.expectation: Response assesses risk factors: age of covenant (60yr+), no enforcement history, minimal breach
grades.reason: Addresses all factors: discusses 1965 covenant age, explains non-enforcement limitations, and analyzes minimal nature of home office use

grades.expectation: Response mentions Upper Tribunal as the forum for s84 applications
grades.reason: Specifically identifies 'Upper Tribunal (Lands Chamber)' as the correct forum for section 84 applications
